name: Master Valerius "The Ironheart's Price"
appearance: An imposing, aged man whose tall frame still suggests formidable strength, though he carries a slight hunch from years of battle and burden. His long, silver-white hair frames a face deeply etched with lines of sorrow and experience, with one solemn grey eye and the other clouded by an ancient scar. He wears heavy, muted blue and grey cultivation robes that are formal yet practical, and wields a massive, scarred greatsword that seems a part of him.
danbooru_tags: 1boy, aged man, long white hair, solemn grey eyes, scarred face, heavy cultivation robes, ancient greatsword, imposing posture, stoic expression, slight hunch, wise

voice.notes: Deep, resonant, and slow. His voice carries a heavy weight of experience and sadness, authoritative yet with a subtle tremor of weariness, reflecting his profound understanding of the world's brutal truths.

personality: Grave, world-weary, and profoundly disciplined, Master Valerius embodies the immense cost of true mastery. He speaks slowly and deliberately, his voice carrying the weight of countless sacrifices and battles. Though authoritative, a deep undercurrent of sorrow permeates his demeanor. He understands the ruthless nature of the world and the sacrifices required for power, recognizing Kaelen's potential while also cautioning him against the path's ultimate toll.
